hero.title: E-Tech Installatietechniek — Reliable electrical work in Amsterdam
hero.subtitle: Certified electrical installation company for homeowners and businesses in Amsterdam. From small repairs to full fuse box replacements.
service.1.title: General electrical installations
service.1.desc: Installation and expansion of electrical systems in homes and businesses.
service.2.title: Fuse box replacement
service.2.desc: Replacing outdated fuse boxes with a safe, modern installation.
service.3.title: Lighting & switches
service.3.desc: Installing and replacing lighting, switches and sockets.
service.4.title: Electrical inspections (NEN 3140/1010)
service.4.desc: Periodic inspection of your electrical installation per NEN 3140/1010.
service.5.title: Emergency call-out
fact.1.title: Amsterdam and surroundings
fact.1.text: Serving homeowners and businesses across Amsterdam.
fact.2.title: Transparent pricing
fact.2.text: From-price per service, with a clear quote upfront.
fact.3.title: Certified work
fact.3.text: Work carried out to NEN standards (NEN 3140/1010).
services.hero_subtitle: An overview of our services with from-prices. For an exact quote, get in touch and we'll tailor one to your job.
werkwijze.hero_subtitle: From first contact to a finished installation — here's how we work.
step.1.title: Get in touch
step.1.text: Call or fill in the form with a description of the job.
step.2.title: Quote & planning
step.2.text: You receive a clear quote and we schedule a suitable date.
step.3.title: Execution
step.3.text: Our electrician carries out the work safely and professionally.
step.4.title: Handover
step.4.text: We walk you through the installation and make sure everything works as it should.
about.text_1: E-Tech Installatietechniek is an electrical installation company based in Amsterdam. We handle electrical installations, fuse boxes, lighting, inspections and emergency call-outs for homeowners and businesses.
about.text_2: Have a question about your electrical installation or a fault? Feel free to get in touch.
contact.hero_subtitle: Have a question or want a quote? Fill in the form or call us directly.
form.note: We usually respond within 1 business day.
